{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323164457F316718436C544D74426"}"},"total":104},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7559358492319236926","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很精彩呢，是一本群像文，玩家们很搞笑，就是有些细节，可能由于字数的原因吧，也没有太详细的写，感觉留下好多遗憾呀，比如他们的基建过程是怎么样子的？打江山容易，守江山难嘛，还有玩家的玩法，女主登基为帝后，那他们还有什么任务活动吗？还有现代，到底会发生什么灾难呢？玩家在游戏里学到了武功，又会如何解决问题？好想知道啊，这就是还没看够，好多未知啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760054493,"group_id":"7532091256256597017","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyCK8vQCrhlcZiiwOtZ3xHdTOwUPRflreQblpHbLJgxL","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2827583866543096","user_name":"刷新你的思想"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2827583866543096","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1677732246,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7532091256256597017","book_info":{"abstract":"第四天灾＋基建＋无cp＋争霸
【宿主对接成功，系统开启！】
 现代打工人苏禾救人不成，反被BUG系统一头撞进古代乱世。
天灾人祸肆虐，朝堂摇摇欲坠，战火随时燎原。 身为落魄世家最后的独苗，苏禾开局就是地狱难度——身无长物，强敌环伺，活下去都成奢望。
 万幸（？）与系统绑定，同生共死。 然而——什么？系统被虫洞啃得只剩个‘游戏平台’功能？还得伺候一群把乱世当‘全息网游’的沙雕玩家？
行吧，为了活命，GM她当了！
 发布任务、画好大饼，看苏·狗策划·禾如何招来‘第四天灾’：找水源、开集市、搞基建？那是基础操作！剿匪，打擂台？玩家们的骚操作才刚开始！
从荒芜之地到繁华之城，从任人宰割到一方霸主，且看‘GM’苏禾如何带领她的‘第四天灾军团’，在这乱世之中，玩出一个太平盛世！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o80edb9284f61bc8c0dd3580d1580264f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"百日心玉","author_id":"","book_id":"7532091256256597017","book_name":"第四天灾：我在古代开服搞基建","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#504848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7532096106491019801","read_count":"525","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"364030"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"173","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,系统,女强,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7120699927416c3cfb47476b9d7b5fac~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779439497&x-signature=f9awwAmOxWJNI6uh0nyz5dhsrqk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1933392216598404","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"273"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323164457F316718436C544D74426"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":121,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":65310,"reply_
